items.question: Who won the unresolved Council and DAO Casters elections, and what were the candidate-level totals?
acceptance_criteria: Winner identities reconcile to an official artifact
Candidate totals preserve the election mechanism
No candidate is inferred from later role occupancy
items.prohibited_inference: Do not infer winners from later Council membership, social posts, or tracker passage alone.

items.question: Which authorized or Council-reported payments occurred on-chain?
acceptance_criteria: Every asserted transfer resolves to a transaction
Token amounts are decoded using the correct mint decimals
PIP authorization is not conflated with payment
items.prohibited_inference: Do not treat Council tracker amounts, vote passage, or a payment schedule as proof of transfer.

items.question: What primary records establish termination, cancellation, or withdrawal after passage?
acceptance_criteria: Terminal state has a dated primary record
Passage remains historically preserved
Payment and implementation remain separate
items.prohibited_inference: Do not convert Council tracker terminology into independently verified completion or non-performance findings.

items.question: What independent evidence supports implementation or deliverable completion for each authorized non-election proposal?
acceptance_criteria: Each implementation claim links to a primary artifact
Milestone reporting remains attributed
Failed proposals remain not authorized
items.prohibited_inference: Do not equate 1/1 tracker milestones with independent implementation verification.

items.question: Which candidate wallet belongs to each captured PIP-25 and PIP-27 candidate?
missing_artifacts: Signed candidate registration record or official ballot export
acceptance_criteria: Each normalized wallet resolves to an official candidate record
The repeated sentinel remains preserved only as a captured placeholder
items.prohibited_inference: Do not assign the repeated Solana sentinel value to any candidate and do not infer wallets from names or later officeholding.

items.question: Can historical portal state transitions be recovered?
acceptance_criteria: Publication, voting, result, and later lifecycle states have dated evidence
Portal state is not used as implementation proof
items.prohibited_inference: Do not infer state-transition dates solely from vote windows.

items.question: Which PIP-33 figures control the authorized and conditional tranche payments?
acceptance_criteria: Both one-cent discrepancies are explicitly resolved
Each tranche remains 75% USDC and 25% ATLAS
Second-tranche reserve condition is preserved
Resolution does not imply payment
items.prohibited_inference: Do not silently choose a corrected cent value or infer that either tranche was paid.
